name: AI Consensus Assessment Initiative Questionnaire
description: AI-specific vendor self-assessment questionnaire derived from AICM. 554 questions structured as one or more yes/no/partial questions per AICM control. AI-CAIQ is to AICM as CAIQ is to CCM — the vendor-attestation form of the controls framework.
relationToCloudSecurity: AI service vendors use AI-CAIQ to self-attest controls coverage for STAR Registry entries.
relationToAISecurity: Standard mechanism for AI vendors to demonstrate AICM coverage. Companion to AICM v1.0.x.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

notes: Use alongside AICM v1.0.3 for vendor assessments.

desired_end_state.notes: Pending AICM 1.0.3 decision (companion CAIQ ships with the parent AICM).
